name: mantsent
description: MantSent - Mantle Sentinel proof/passport app for Mantle wallet anomaly alerts.

scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/scripts/test-policy-parser.js && node dist/scripts/test-monitor-fixtures.js && node dist/scripts/test-state-scopes.js && node dist/scripts/test-sqlite-state-scopes.js && node dist/scripts/test-dashboard-token.js && node dist/scripts/test-health-payload.js && node dist/scripts/test-client-analytics.js && node dist/scripts/test-client-render.js
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run typecheck && node dist/scripts/test-policy-parser.js && node dist/scripts/test-monitor-fixtures.js && node dist/scripts/test-state-scopes.js && node dist/scripts/test-sqlite-state-scopes.js && node dist/scripts/test-dashboard-token.js && node dist/scripts/test-health-payload.js && node dist/scripts/test-client-analytics.js && node dist/scripts/test-client-render.js
